title: Your listening profile
subtitle: We learn what you enjoy from your browsing, listening, bookmarks, and ratings — then tailor recommendations and notifications.

coldStart.title: We're still learning your tastes
coldStart.body: Browse categories, listen to episodes, bookmark favorites, and rate shows — your profile will build automatically.

notifications.title: Episode notifications
notifications.body: Get notified when new episodes publish in categories you follow. Works best when iSounds is installed on your home screen.
notifications.iosHint: On iPhone, add iSounds to your Home Screen first, then enable notifications here.

privacy.title: Your data
privacy.body: Taste signals stay on iSounds servers — we don't use third-party ad trackers.
privacy.resetConfirm: Category pins, hides, and notification toggles were reset.

push.unsupported: Push notifications aren't supported in this browser.
push.notConfigured: Push notifications aren't configured on the server yet.
push.denied: Notification permission was denied. Enable it in browser settings.
push.enabled: Notifications enabled for your favorite categories.

rateLimited: Please wait a moment before refreshing again.
